cartesian coordinate system

http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs/ powered by Static GeoPubby generated using the SPARQLing Unicorn QGIS Plugin
☰
Search: Download Options: Format: 

Description: coordinate system in Euclidean space which gives the position of points relative to n mutually perpendicular straight axes all having the same unit of measure

PropertyValue
type (rdf:type)Class (owl:Class)
isDefinedBy (rdfs:isDefinedBy)18-005r4.html
label (rdfs:label)cartesian coordinate system (rdf:langString) (iso6391:en)
subClassOf (rdfs:subClassOf)
  • affine coordinate system (geocrs:AffineCoordinateSystem)
  • orthogonal coordinate system (geocrs:OrthogonalCoordinateSystem)
definition (skos:definition)coordinate system in Euclidean space which gives the position of points relative to n mutually perpendicular straight axes all having the same unit of measure (rdf:langString) (iso6391:en)
